description:
Create the protoLabs Discord server and update all "TBA" placeholders across the codebase with the real invite link.

## Files to update

Once the Discord is live, replace "TBA" / placeholder links in these files:

- `SECURITY.md` — 3 locations (Discord preferred contact, announcements link, contact section)
- `README.md` — 3 locations (badge href + shield URL with guild ID, community section, contributing section)
- `CONTRIBUTING.md` — 2 locations (real-time chat link, getting help section)
- `.github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/config.yml` — 1 location (contact link URL)
- `.github/workflows/close-external-prs.yml` — 1 location (auto-close PR comment)

## What to do

1. Create protoLabs Discord server (or use existing guild 1070606339363049492 if public-facing)
2. Generate a permanent invite link
3. Replace all "Discord invite link TBA", "Discord (TBA)", and placeholder `#` hrefs with the real link
4. Update the README Discord badge to use the real guild ID: `https://img.shields.io/discord/GUILD_ID?color=5865F2&label=Discord&logo=discord&logoColor=white`
5. Verify all links work
